title: Uuirco's Crystal Optimizer Server
description: Server-side companion mod for Crystal Optimizer. Allows administrators to enable or disable Crystal Optimizer features for all connected players with a simple command.
body:
# Crystal Optimizer Server

Crystal Optimizer Server is the official server-side companion mod for Crystal Optimizer.

This mod allows server administrators to control whether Crystal Optimizer features are permitted on their server. When disabled, compatible Crystal Optimizer clients will automatically deactivate their optimization features upon joining.

## Features

* Enable or disable Crystal Optimizer support server-wide
* Automatically synchronizes the setting to connected players
* Persists settings across server restarts
* Lightweight and simple to use
* No client-side installation required for server operation

## Command

/uuircofastercrystals true

Enables Crystal Optimizer support for all connected players.

---

/uuircofastercrystals false

Disables Crystal Optimizer support for all connected players.

## Requirements

* Minecraft 1.21.11
* Fabric Loader

## Notes

This mod is intended to be used alongside the Crystal Optimizer client mod. Players without the client mod are unaffected.
